metrics.name: trend
metrics.interpretation: Recent trajectory is positive or stable.

metrics.name: sample_size
metrics.interpretation: History remains too short for strong calibration claims.

metrics.name: outcome_hit_rate
metrics.interpretation: Recommendations are beginning to earn trust through measured outcomes.

strengths: Outcome hit rate is high enough to start letting recommendations earn more authority.
weaknesses: Even naive next-step prediction remains noisy; forecast confidence should stay modest.
Sparse history limits self-calibration and learning-rate estimation.
Volatility is high enough that single-path recommendations may be misleading.
recommendations: Log prediction outcomes and recommendation acceptance on every scoring run.
Demote certainty automatically when stability and sample size are weak.
Track strategy-level hit rates, not just raw score accuracy.
Let regret and contradiction pressure cap execution autonomy and narrator assertiveness.
confidenceAdjustmentReason: high hit rate (100%) + low regret → widened

plattCalibration.summary: Platt calibration needs ≥4 resolved outcomes; 3 available. Confidence values are uncalibrated.
